description_long: This object consists of a set of six short swords or large daggers, each with a distinct handle and blade design. The blades are straight, double-edged, and taper to a sharp point, with some showing a metallic sheen and others a darker, matte finish. The handles vary in color and material, including gold, silver, black, and green, with some featuring ornate pommels and crossguards. The green-handled sword has a textured grip, while others have smooth or slightly contoured handles. The crossguards are prominent and vary in shape, providing both protection and decorative flair. The overall appearance suggests these are functional yet decorative weapons, possibly inspired by historical or fantasy designs.
description: A set of six ornate, straight-bladed short swords with varied handle designs and metallic finishes. Each sword features a distinct color scheme and decorative crossguard.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six swords upright, highlighting the variety in handle colors and crossguard designs.
description_view_1: Angled side view emphasizing the length and taper of the blades, with handles and pommels clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the blades and the full profile of the handles and pommels.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, focusing on the blade edges and the decorative details of the handles.
attribute_handle_design: varied; contoured and straight handles with metallic, wooden, and leather finishes, some with ornate pommels
attribute_ornamentation: decorative pommels, colored handles, and varied crossguard designs
